title: Ghast Tweaks
body:
# Ghast Tweaks Data Pack

*Enhance your Minecraft experience with Ghast Tweaks, a datapack designed to make acquiring Ghast Tears simpler and more accessible! Say goodbye to tedious Ghast hunts - now you can craft Ghast Tears with a combination of common items.*

## Crafting Recipe Example: 
Fire Charge + Iron Nugget + Water Bucket = Ghast Tear

### Crafting Recipe:
To craft a Ghast Tear, arrange the items in the crafting table as follows:

![Ghast tear craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2f38040088c4a97d6e6ced6edb35518a048c676.png)

### How to Use:
1. Download the Ghast Tweaks Datapack.
2. Place the downloaded file into the "datapacks" folder in your Minecraft world save.
3. Launch Minecraft and open your world.
4. Use the `/reload` command to activate the data pack.
5. Start crafting and enjoy easier access to Ghast Tears for your brewing and crafting needs!

### Compatibility:
- No additional dependencies required.

### Simplify Your Gameplay:
Immerse yourself in a world where Ghast Tears are just a craft away. Whether you're a potion master or an adventurer preparing for the end-game, Ghast Tweaks adds a convenient touch to your Minecraft experience. Craft, brew, and let your adventures continue seamlessly!

**Download Ghast Tweaks now and experience the convenience of crafted Ghast Tears in Minecraft!**
